name: Prasad Gade Portfolio
description: Static JSON API skills for querying structured data about Prasad Gade — data scientist and computer engineer from Mumbai, India.

skills.name: get_resume

skills.name: get_projects

skills.name: get_skills

skills.name: get_social

skills.name: get_about
skills.description: Get personality traits, hobbies, site philosophy, keyboard shortcut details, favorite movies, songs, and what makes this portfolio unique
